attachments.name: Step Passed: Valid vaccination record is created with Patient 'Random' and vaccine_type '6IN1'

Step Passed: The request will be successful with the status code '200'
Step Passed: The Search Response should contain search results and OperationOutcome for invalid target-disease codes
